evidence.description: Served as resident physician at Kahrizak, examined tortured detainees including Mohsen Ruholamini, and submitted report documenting cause of death

evidence.source_title: Iranian authorities must investigate death of detention centre doctor
evidence.description: Amnesty International described Pourandarjani as the physician who examined prisoners and documented torture at Kahrizak, and later testified to parliament

editorial_notes: Pourandarjani was the Kahrizak resident physician who documented the torture; testified to parliamentary investigation before his suspicious death
